name: io.github.nirholas/kol-mcp
title: three.ws KOL
description: Per-wallet KOL deep dive — a tracked trader's portfolio P&L and its trades on a given mint.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves the KOL endpoints. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the live KOL reads.
